title: pelargonium × carnescens
intro: Pelargonium × carnescens, also known as Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family, resulting from the cross between Pelargonium capitatum and Pelargonium tomentosum. This plant is valued for its essential oil, which contains geraniol and linalool, offering medicinal properties such as antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Rose Geranium include reduced stress, improved digestion, and relief from menstrual cramps and menopausal symptoms. The herbal preparations of Rose Geranium include teas, essential oils, and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
